description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a dense border of tall, leafy trees, providing privacy and a natural barrier from the street. The structure features a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade with a mix of white, gray, and brick-red exterior finishes. Large windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. The property includes a driveway with parked cars and a small, manicured lawn area, as well as a paved sidewalk and street access. The rear and side views reveal additional green spaces and a fenced boundary, enhancing the sense of seclusion. The overall design is contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor and indoor living spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white, gray, and brick-red finishes, surrounded by tall trees and featuring large, symmetrical windows and a driveway.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from above the driveway, highlighting the front entrance, parked cars, and the dense tree line along the street.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear of the bungalow, emphasizing the full tree enclosure and the back facade with its large windows and brick detailing.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the bungalow, revealing the garage, side lawn, and the continuation of the tree barrier.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a direct street-facing perspective, showcasing the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and the driveway with cars parked in front.
